title: Premium 12 inch Large Disposable Plates - Pack of 50. Made from Sugarcane Fibre - Bagasse Compostable Plates, Sustainable Solutions for Plastic-Free Parties and Events!
features: ♻️ ECO-FRIENDLY: Made from renewable sugarcane fibers, our 12 inch bagasse disposable plates are a sustainable alternative to traditional paper plates or plastic plates.
♻️ STURDY: These bagasse disposable plates are durable and reliable, able to hold hot and cold food. They are microwaveable, so you can reheat your food in a snap.
♻️ VERSATILE AND PRACTICAL: Our 12 inch disposable plates can be used for a wide range of occasions, from casual family dinners to weddings and other formal events.

♻️ LARGE SIZE: With a diameter of 12 inches, these biodegradable plates are large enough to hold ample portions of food, making them suitable for serving main courses, salads, and other larger dishes.
♻️ COMPOSTABLE: Once you're done using our biodegradable plates, you can compost them, providing nutrients back into the soil and reducing your carbon footprint.

Note: Bagasse products, crafted from natural sugarcane fibres, may display slight imperfections like colour variations, texture differences, or minor irregularities inherent in the organic material. These characteristics do not affect the product's functionality, ensuring they remain suitable for their intended purpose.
description: Product Description ECOWINGS 12" Bagasse Plates - Big portions, small footprint. Serve up smiles with these 12-inch disposable plates. They are kind to the planet and perfect for piling high with deliciousness. Made from natural fibres, they're sturdy, and microwave-safe - Happy Tummies, Happy Earth! Go big, go green! These spacious 12-inch plates handle any feast, hot or cold. Made from plant-based goodness, they're strong and kind to the planet . Easy cleanup, happy guests – it's a win-win! Plant-powered plates! Ditch the flimsy, embrace the fun with these 12-inch beauties. Made from natural fibres, they're sturdy and microwave-safe. Party on, plate responsibly! Go XL with your meals! Our roomy 12-inch plates offer ample space for all your culinary creations, from towering burgers to family-style servings. And with their comfortable depth , you can say goodbye to accidental table dribbles! Serve it up in style. Pack of 50 Large Size Microwave-safe Bagasse plates are microwave-safe, allowing for convenient reheating of food without harmful chemical leaching, making them an ideal choice for quick and easy warm-ups. Bio-degradable Bagasse plates are entirely sustainable, naturally decomposing in the environment, making a positive impact on waste reduction and our planet's cleanliness. *ECOWINGS bagasse tableware is CIPET certified as bio-degradable (Test Date: 29/04/2022) using the ASTM D 5338 method, with complete bio-degradation observed in 45 days. Natural Material Bagasse plates are crafted from sugarcane waste, a renewable and sustainable resource, reducing the environmental impact of traditional disposable tableware. *ECOWINGS bagasse tableware is CIPET certified as bio-degradable (Test Date: 29/04/2022) using the ASTM D 5338 method, with complete bio-degradation observed in 45 days. Safety first! These plates are rigorously tested and meet all food-grade standards for complete peace of mind. *US FDA 21.CFR.176.170 food contact compliant. Certificate available upon request. Process to Make Bagasse Our plates are crafted from 100% natural, plant-based materials, ensuring a responsible choice from start to finish. From ethically sourced ingredients to a production process mindful of the environment , these plates offer peace of mind at every step. Disclaimer ECOWINGS bagasse tableware is certified as bio-degradable by the CIPET, Institute of Plastic Technology, INDIA. According to the test report dated 29/04/2022, conducted using the ASTM D 5338 biodegradation test method, the test value obtained indicated complete bio-degradation at the end of 45 days. Note: Bagasse products, crafted from natural sugarcane fibres, may display slight imperfections like colour variations, texture differences, or minor irregularities , such as specks , inherent in the organic material. These characteristics do not affect the product's functionality, ensuring they remain suitable for their intended purpose.
